raw_consumer_statement:
phone call caused me to approve a purchase of a gift card for {$990.00}. I was told this would never come out of my account, but the credit card company told me it will because I approved it and they can do nothing about it. This occurred on XX/XX/scrub>XXXX XXXX XXXX 
I talked to the credit card company and they directed me to the FTC and I was passed on to the CFPB.
